component.name: Xonotic Touch
component.summary: Touch-only arena FPS for Linux tablets and phones

description.p: Xonotic Touch brings the fast-paced arena shooter Xonotic to Linux touch tablets and phones. Virtual joysticks, weapon wheels, and layout presets are tuned for two-thumb play in landscape. A touchscreen is required; this build is not intended for keyboard-and-mouse play.
The Flatpak is small at install (~60 MB). Textures, maps, and music download on first launch (~3 GB) so updates stay quick.

screenshot.caption: Xonotic Touch on a touch device

description.p: Flatpak-first distribution with runtime asset download and automated CI releases.
